method3.c
Ir a la documentación de este archivo.
1#include "iq_bench.h"
2
7
8#include <math.h>
9
22void method3_dc_rms_norm(complexf_t *x, size_t n)
23{
24 if (!x || n == 0)
25 {
26 return;
27 }
28
29 float mean_re = 0.0f;
30 float mean_im = 0.0f;
31
32 for (size_t i = 0; i < n; i++)
33 {
34 /* First pass: estimate DC component. */
35 mean_re += x[i].re;
36 mean_im += x[i].im;
37 }
38
39 mean_re /= (float)n;
40 mean_im /= (float)n;
41
42 float energy = 0.0f;
43 for (size_t i = 0; i < n; i++)
44 {
45 /* Second pass: remove DC and accumulate energy for RMS. */
46 x[i].re -= mean_re;
47 x[i].im -= mean_im;
48 energy += x[i].re * x[i].re + x[i].im * x[i].im;
49 }
50
51 float rms = sqrtf(energy / (float)n);
52 if (rms > 1e-12f)
53 {
54 /* Final pass: normalize to unit RMS to stabilize PSD scale. */
55 float inv_rms = 1.0f / rms;
56 for (size_t i = 0; i < n; i++)
57 {
58 x[i].re *= inv_rms;
59 x[i].im *= inv_rms;
60 }
61 }
62}
iq_bench.h
Interfaz publica del benchmark C para procesamiento IQ Metodo 3.
method3_dc_rms_norm
void method3_dc_rms_norm(complexf_t *x, size_t n)
Aplica Metodo 3 en sitio sobre un arreglo complejo.

complexf_t::im
float im

complexf_t::re
